provisionalUse: May guide frozen Sprint 6 evaluation only; it does not authorize production rank weights, drops, or owner-approved labels.

relevance.0: Not a credible broad-discovery choice in this frozen context; it may still be a real listing.
relevance.1: Legitimate but niche, low-information, weakly timed, or otherwise a poor lead choice for this context.
relevance.2: Credible, context-appropriate choice with meaningful user value, but not the strongest available lead.
relevance.3: Strong, specific, context-appropriate choice that is defensible as a lead when objective safety gates pass.

actionable.yes: Usable for the frozen surface and time with enough date, time, location, or access information to act.
actionable.no: Not usable for the frozen surface and time; this does not say the underlying listing is illegitimate.

gem.yes: Evidence supports an exceptional, under-discovered choice under the ratified gem rule.
gem.no: Evidence does not support a gem claim.
gem.insufficient: Evidence is incomplete; it must not support a gem claim.

evidenceTiers.candidate: Browse/listing language only; do not say recommended, best, most popular, or locals love.
evidenceTiers.recommended: May say recommended when the retained evidence supports that wording; do not say best, #1, most popular, or locals love.
evidenceTiers.top-placement: May use top-placement language with inspectable receipts; superlatives still require the specific supported claim.

sparseCityLimited.activation: Explicit limited coverage state plus fewer than evaluationPrefix eligible, actionable, non-duplicate candidates.
sparseCityLimited.effect: Render an honest limited state; source share, precision, and nDCG are not passed or waived when the required sample does not exist.
